title: House Passes Bills That Would Worsen Energy Affordability & Reliability
description:
WASHINGTON, D.C. — House Republicans passed a pair of bills this week that would undercut energy affordability and decrease energy reliability. Passed yesterday, H.R. 4626, the Home Appliance Protection and Affordability Act, would make it easier to weaken or revoke federal appliance efficiency standards and harder to update them, locking families ... [continued]

The post House Passes Bills That Would Worsen Energy Affordability & Reliability appeared first on CleanTechnica.
